in a case like this, i don't even care if the spot starts to roll down.
i only take 1 or 2 intraday trades at max.
no point to take too much trades.
no edge + not my style... i like longer term positions

comment.body: Tariffs on India are designed to break Russia. It is a geopolitcal play however Trump forgets India is a 4 trillion economy and 4thlargest in the world. It will not be pushed around like the smaller EU countries. Also India purifies the russian crude and supplies it back to Europe. Will backfire badly on Trump via rising oil prices. Alma also said something similar in her monthly/weekly post regarding upcoming oil price spike in September. Will add to consumer inflation.
